typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varQTEArchiveDestFullPath as string (),
	varQTEArchiveFolder as string (),
	varQTEFileDateString as string (),
	varQTEFileName as string (),
	varQTEFilePrefix as string (),
	varQTEFullFileName as string (),
	varQTELatestSourceFileName as string (),
	varQTELatestSourceFullPath as string (),
	varQTELogFilePath as string (),
	varQTERecDate as timestamp (),
	varQTERenamedDestFullPath as string (),
	varQTEReportDate as string (),
	varQTESourceFolder as string ()
}

source(output(
		Phase as double,
		AppId as string,
		LOB as string,
		CIO as string,
		CDAE as string,
		Testing_Lead as string,
		BAM_CIO as string,
		target_landing_Zone as string,
		MAP_CIO as string,
		Test_Status as string,
		App_Override as string,
		App_Override_Requester as string,
		App_Override_Rationale as string,
		App_Override_Evidence_Link as string,
		Priority as double,
		Process_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Override_Cleanup as string,
		Asset_Check as string,
		Asset_Count as double,
		readiness_tag as string,
		change_tranche as double,
		trtc_tranche as double,
		change_tranche_desc as string,
		trtc_tranche_desc as string,
		PROD_DATE as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DAYS_UNTIL as double,
		Scope as string,
		Execution_Flag as string,
		Test_Events__ as double,
		Coverage as string,
		Expected_Test_Cases as double,
		CCP_Scope as string,
		performance_test as string,
		Completion_Date as string,
		DCMS_25_SCOPE as string,
		DCMS_26_SCOPE as string,
		All_DCMS_TCI_App_Status as string,
		operational_status_description as string,
		application_name as string,
		bam_app_status as string,
		HyperExecute as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> QTESources
QTESources derive(RECDATE = Process_Date) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		performance_test as string,
		CCP_Scope as string,
		Phase as double,
		Override_Cleanup as string,
		Testing_Lead as string,
		trtc_tranche as double,
		Asset_Check as string,
		App_Override as string,
		Test_Status as string,
		change_tranche as double,
		RECDATE as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		MAP_CIO as string,
		CDAE as string,
		Expected_Test_Cases as double,
		LOB as string,
		App_Override_Evidence_Link as string,
		change_tranche_desc as string,
		Test_Events__ as string,
		trtc_tranche_desc as string,
		PROD_DATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Priority as double,
		CIO as string,
		DAYS_UNTIL as double,
		Coverage as string,
		App_Override_Rationale as string,
		readiness_tag as string,
		App_Override_Requester as string,
		App_Status as string,
		DCMS_25_SCOPE as string,
		DCMS_26_SCOPE as string,
		AppId as string,
		Scope as string,
		target_landing_Zone as string,
		BAM_CIO as string,
		Asset_Count as double,
		Process_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Execution_Flag as string,
		Completion_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		performance_test,
		CCP_Scope,
		Phase,
		Override_Cleanup,
		Testing_Lead,
		trtc_tranche,
		Asset_Check,
		App_Override,
		Test_Status,
		change_tranche,
		RECDATE,
		MAP_CIO,
		CDAE,
		Expected_Test_Cases,
		LOB,
		App_Override_Evidence_Link,
		change_tranche_desc,
		Test_Events__,
		trtc_tranche_desc,
		PROD_DATE,
		Priority,
		CIO,
		DAYS_UNTIL,
		Coverage,
		App_Override_Rationale,
		readiness_tag,
		App_Override_Requester,
		App_Status = All_DCMS_TCI_App_Status,
		DCMS_25_SCOPE,
		DCMS_26_SCOPE,
		AppId,
		Scope,
		target_landing_Zone,
		BAM_CIO,
		Asset_Count,
		Process_Date,
		Execution_Flag,
		Completion_Date)) ~> OLEDBDestination
